summary: Well-organized test suite with good structure, glob pattern coverage, and error case handling. However, critically missing a test case where a single file matches multiple rules with the same label at different priorities—the core scenario that exercises the priority-conflict resolution logic (the main reason priority ordering exists). Tests would catch basic bugs but could miss regressions in priority handling. The distinction between unit tests (bats), structural tests (workflow_structure.bats), and integration tests (run-act-tests.sh) is clear, but the missing same-label-different-priority scenario is a significant gap in coverage of core requirements.
